title: PDF opens full-screen from explorer right-click (dbg93)
description:
Plan View on the PDF tab now shows the file explorer only until you open a PDF. Right-click a PDF and choose Open in PDF Viewer or Open in Map Builder — the workspace opens in a full-screen overlay with the same tools as before. A top-right menu (☰) includes Close PDF to return to the explorer.

Left-click on PDF rows no longer auto-opens the workspace. Legacy entry points (bookmarks, modals) still open PDFs and keep the fullscreen session in sync.

Who is affected: OVH private server (PipeSync Plan View). SaaS is unchanged until a platform release is applied in cPanel.
changeLog: PDF tab default: file explorer only — workspace hidden until you open a file.
Right-click PDF → Open in PDF Viewer or Open in Map Builder.
Full-screen overlay reuses existing PDF workspace tools and board.
Top-right ☰ menu → Close PDF ends session and returns to explorer.
Left-click on PDF rows no longer opens workspace.
New pdf-fullscreen-shell.js module; cache bust dbg93.
